chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2731 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 12108/2022 2. For hearing of main case 21.02.2025 Ms. Lubna Pervaiz advocate for the petitioner Mr. Amjad Hayat advocate holds brief for Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, this petition assails audit notice/s. It is stated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that petitioner be permitted to raise legal objections including those with respect to the preceding audit notices. It is further sought that pending adjudication of the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
